# agentops_capabilities (Data Source)

The authorization capabilities available to this account.

## Example Usage

```terraform
# All authorization capabilities known to the account.
data "agentops_capabilities" "all" {}

output "capability_keys" {
  value = [for c in data.agentops_capabilities.all.capabilities : c.key]
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Read-Only

- `capabilities` (Attributes List) Available authorization capabilities. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--capabilities))

<a id="nestedatt--capabilities"></a>
### Nested Schema for `capabilities`

Read-Only:

- `allows` (String) The action this capability allows.
- `domain` (String) The domain the capability belongs to.
- `key` (String) The capability key.
- `sensitivity` (String) The sensitivity level of the capability.
